title: Limbdi Heat Wave
lead: Limbdi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.09. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Limbdi are extreme, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 42%, and the wind speed is approximately 19.3 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, as indicated by the 0.0 GG Heating Degree Day (HDD) value.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Limbdi.
